headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 19, 2026**
article:
The New York Yankees dominated the Kansas City Royals, winning 13-4 behind a strong performance from Will Warren. Cody Bellinger led the Yankees' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs. In other action, the Cincinnati Reds secured a 5-4 victory over the Minnesota Twins, while the Chicago Cubs edged the New York Mets 2-4.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Jhoan Duran of the Philadelphia Phillies, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left oblique strain. Other injured players include Jorge Polanco of the New York Mets, Patrick Wisdom of the Seattle Mariners, Zach McKinstry of the Detroit Tigers, Josh Hader of the Houston Astros, and Daniel Palencia of the Chicago Cubs.

The Los Angeles Dodgers made a move on April 16, acquiring right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott in a trade with the Baltimore Orioles. The Dodgers also traded RHP Griff McGarry to the Los Angeles Dodgers for Future Considerations. International Bonus Pool Money. The New York Mets traded LHP Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash, while the Arizona Diamondbacks traded RHP Junior Fernández to the Milwaukee Brewers.

top_news.title: **Yankees Rout Royals 13-4**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees dominated the Kansas City Royals, winning 13-4 behind a strong performance from Will Warren, who earned the win with 7.0 innings pitched, 11 strikeouts, and 2 earned runs. Cody Bellinger led the Yankees' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Reds Edge Twins in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds secured a 5-4 victory over the Minnesota Twins, with Kyle Nicolas earning the win after a scoreless inning of relief. Tony Santillan closed out the game with a save, while Tyler Stephenson led the Reds' offense with 2 RBI.

top_news.title: **Mets Fall Short in Chicago**
top_news.summary: The New York Mets dropped a 2-4 decision to the Chicago Cubs, with Carson Kelly leading the Cubs' offense with a home run and three RBIs. Jameson Taillon earned the win for the Cubs, pitching six innings with four strikeouts and one earned run.

top_news.title: **Rays Edge Pirates in Thrilling 8-7 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a hard-fought 8-7 win over the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Cedric Mullins leading the charge at the plate. Mullins finished with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs in 5 at-bats.

top_news.title: **Phillies RHP Jhoan Duran Lands on 15-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Philadelphia Phillies right-hander Jhoan Duran has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left oblique strain, effective retroactive to April 15, 2026.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Acquire RHP Chayce McDermott in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers made a move on April 16, 2026, acquiring right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott in a trade. McDermott joins the Dodgers after being dealt from the Baltimore Orioles.
